zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian de Talbot於1282年出生時，她的父親Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal33歲，母親Sarah de Beauchamp33歲。她於1287年與Pain de Turberville在英國英格蘭賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1346年之前，埋葬在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根可迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian de Talbot于1282年出生时，她的父亲Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal33岁，母亲Sarah de Beauchamp33岁。她于1287年与Pain de Turberville在英国英格兰賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1346年之前，埋葬在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根可迪。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian de Talbot was born in 1282, her father, Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal, was 33 and her mother, Sarah de Beauchamp, was 33. She married Pain de Turberville in 1287, in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died before 1346, and was buried in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian de Talbot est née en 1282, son père, Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Sarah de Beauchamp, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Pain de Turberville en 1287, à Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1346, et a été enterrée à Coity, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian de Talbot 1282 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal 33 und ihre Mutter Sarah de Beauchamp 33. Sie hat 1287 in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Pain de Turberville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1346 und wurde in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian de Talbot è nata il nel 1282, sua padre, Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Sarah de Beauchamp, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Pain de Turberville nel 1287, nel Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 1346, e fu sepolta a Coity, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian de Talbotが1282年に生まれた時，父Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswalは33歳，母Sarah de Beauchampは33歳であった。1287年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャード'ス カストルでPain de Turbervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1346年以前に死去し，イギリスウェールズグラモーガンコイトイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian de Talbot(이)가 1282년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah de Beauchamp(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 리처드'스 카스틀에서 Pain de Turberville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1346년 이전 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 글램르건 코이티에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian de Talbot nasceu em 1282, seu pai, Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Sarah de Beauchamp, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Pain de Turberville em 1287, em Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1346, e foi sepultada em Coity, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian de Talbot родилась в 1282 г., её отцу по имени Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah de Beauchamp, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pain de Turberville в 1287 г. в местности ричард'с кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла перед 1346 г. и была похоронена в местности коити, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.
